## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet test` passes locally
- [ ] New logic (routing / args / parsing / staging) is covered by tests
- [ ] `XtractForge.Core` stays free of Windows-only APIs
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, …)
- [ ] Stays within scope: no plugin system, no theme system, one window
      (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Tested manually with a real download (say which tool/site below)
